name: parallel
description: Product guidance for using parallel through its MCP bridge and projectctl CLI during implementation, resumption, and handoff workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Guidance for using parallel during execution through MCP or projectctl.
interface.longDescription: Teaches agents to use parallel as the execution-time workflow system once planning turns into implementation: inspect state, ensure or resume sessions, claim steps, log progress, manage blockers, propose decisions, and refresh handoff through the desktop app's local MCP bridge or the projectctl CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Parallel to find active work across my watched repos and tell me what matters next.
Start implementing this approved plan in Parallel by checking state and claiming the right step.
Resume work in Parallel by claiming the right step, logging progress, and updating handoff.
